---
title: "Open Stats Lab Additional Analytic Skills in R Using Data from Gino, Kouchaki, and Galinsky (2015)"
authors:
  - admin
date: "2018-12-10"
slug: osl-gino-kouchaki-galinsky-2015
summary: "A solution to Kevin P. McIntyre's Open Stats Lab activity on additional analytic skills using a data set from Gino, Kouchaki, and Galinsky (2015)."
categories:
  - R
  - Tutorial
tags:
  - anova
  - t-test
  - alpha
  - chi-square
  - open data
image:
  caption: ""
  focal_point: ""
output:
  blogdown::html_page:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
---
